scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npm run patch:test-runtime && vitest run tests/unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run patch:test-runtime && vitest run tests/integration
scripts.test:e2e: npm run patch:test-runtime && playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --reporter=line && playwright test tests/e2e/iphone-mini.spec.js --reporter=line
scripts.test:visual: npm run patch:test-runtime && vitest run tests/visual
scripts.test:visual:screenshots: npm run patch:test-runtime && ENABLE_SCREENSHOT_VISUALS=1 playwright test tests/e2e/visual.spec.js
scripts.test:perf: npm run patch:test-runtime && vitest run tests/perf
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual && npm run test:perf
scripts.test:fast: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:visual && npm run test:perf
scripts.test:update: npm run patch:test-runtime && VECTURA_UPDATE_BASELINES=1 npm run test:visual
scripts.hooks:install: HOOKS_DIR="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir)/hooks" && cp scripts/hooks/pre-commit "$HOOKS_DIR/pre-commit" && cp scripts/hooks/pre-push "$HOOKS_DIR/pre-push" && chmod +x "$HOOKS_DIR/pre-commit" "$HOOKS_DIR/pre-push"
